summary: Tested CreditRiskDashboard component integration in Loans page. All 5 test cases passed: Loans page loads correctly, Get Report button opens modal, modal displays bureau selection sidebar (CIBIL, Equifax, Experian, CRIF), Fetch All Reports button is visible, and close button works correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CreditRiskDashboard component fully tested and working. All features verified: 1) Modal opens from Get Report button, 2) Bureau sidebar shows CIBIL, Equifax, Experian, CRIF with Fetch Report buttons, 3) Fetch All Reports button visible in header, 4) Close button (X) works correctly, 5) Modal displays 'No Credit Report Selected' message when no bureau is selected.

features_tested.get_report_button: PASS - 15 'Get Report' buttons found in Credit Reports column
features_tested.modal_opens: PASS - CreditRiskDashboard modal opens when clicking Get Report
features_tested.modal_header: PASS - Modal header shows 'Credit Risk Assessment' with customer name and PAN
features_tested.bureau_sidebar_cibil: PASS - CIBIL bureau option found with data-testid='bureau-CIBIL'
features_tested.bureau_sidebar_equifax: PASS - Equifax bureau option found with data-testid='bureau-Equifax'
features_tested.bureau_sidebar_experian: PASS - Experian bureau option found with data-testid='bureau-Experian'
features_tested.bureau_sidebar_crif: PASS - CRIF bureau option found with data-testid='bureau-CRIF'
